warnings.message: The blueprint lists PubMedBERT and BioBERT as baselines but provides no reference performance metrics (N/A). While this is acceptable for a research plan, ensure you run these baselines on the exact same split to establish a valid delta.
Using a T5-small paraphraser to generate training data for PubMedQA may introduce synthetic artifacts. Ensure the paraphraser is not trained on the PubMedQA test set to maintain evaluation integrity.

summary: The experimental blueprint is well-structured, scientifically grounded, and addresses the identified gaps in reproducibility and per-question-type analysis. The ablation strategy is robust and appropriately isolates the proposed contrastive components. No fatal execution-blocking issues were found.
